mapper.sql: CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID) = 1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END AS id, NAME AS name, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(PRI) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, PRI) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS roll_id
mapper.select:
select top 1
from BIO_USERMAST where ID = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}) and ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 order by BU_ID desc
mapper.delete: update BIO_USERMAST set ISDELETED = 1, DEL_DATE = GETDATE(), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() where ID = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}) and ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0
mapper.insert: MERGE BIO_USERMAST AS target USING (SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS ID) AS src ON target.ID = src.ID WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET NAME = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRI = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{rollId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), ISDELETED = 0, DEL_DATE = NULL, UPD_DATE = GETDATE(), TR_DATE = ISNULL(target.TR_DATE, GETDATE()) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TR_DATE, SLNO, ID, NAME, PRI, PASSWD, CARDNO, GRPNO, TZ, ISDELETED, DEL_DATE, UPD_DATE, Verify) VALUES ( GETDATE(), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}), #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{rollId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), '', '', '1', '0000000100000000', 0, NULL, GETDATE(), '-1' );
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(u.ID) = 1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, u.ID) ELSE NULL END AS id, u.NAME AS name, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(u.PRI) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, u.PRI) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS roll_id FROM ( SELECT BU_ID, ID, NAME, PRI, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY BU_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 AND ISNUMERIC(ID) = 1 ) u WHERE u.rn = 1
mapper.insert: insert into BIO_USERMAST ( TR_DATE, SLNO, ID, NAME, PRI, PASSWD, CARDNO, GRPNO, TZ, ISDELETED, DEL_DATE, UPD_DATE, Verify ) values ( GETDATE(), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}), #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{rollId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), '', '', '1', '0000000100000000', 0, NULL, GETDATE(), '-1' )
mapper.update:
update BIO_USERMAST
NAME = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRI = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{rollId,jdbcType=INTEGER}),
UPD_DATE = GETDATE(), ISDELETED = 0, DEL_DATE = NULL
where ID = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT})

update BIO_USERMAST set NAME = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRI = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{rollId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), UPD_DATE = GETDATE(), ISDELETED = 0, DEL_DATE = NULL where ID = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT})
